requirement_topic.en: Bilingual EN/FR Labelling and Consumer Information
requirement_topic.zh: 英文/法文双语标签与消费者信息
requirement_topic.zht: 英文/法文雙語標籤與消費者資訊

summary.en: Canada has two official languages, and the former MVSR power-assisted bicycle definition expressly required the manufacturer's permanent label to state in both official languages that the vehicle was a power-assisted bicycle as defined in the regulation. In current commercial practice, e-bike products for Canada should prepare English/French labels, warnings, charger markings, battery warnings, manuals, warranty information, and packaging content, with added Quebec French review where the product is sold in Quebec. Bilingual information is also important for TDG marks and shipping documents where prescribed by the TDG regime.
summary.zh: 加拿大有两种官方语言，原MVSR助力自行车定义明确要求制造商永久标签以两种官方语言声明该车辆为法规所定义的助力自行车。在现行商业实践中，面向加拿大的电动自行车产品应准备英文/法文标签、警示、充电器标志、电池警示、说明书、保修信息和包装内容；若在魁北克销售，还需进行魁北克法语审查。在TDG体系规定的情况下，危险货物标志和运输文件的双语信息同样重要。
summary.zht: 加拿大有兩種官方語言，原MVSR助力自行車定義明確要求製造商永久標籤以兩種官方語言聲明該車輛為法規所定義的助力自行車。在現行商業實務中，面向加拿大的電動自行車產品應準備英文/法文標籤、警示、充電器標誌、電池警示、說明書、保固資訊和包裝內容；若在魁北克銷售，還需進行魁北克法語審查。在TDG體系規定的情況下，危險貨物標誌和運輸文件的雙語資訊同樣重要。

standards_or_laws: Motor Vehicle Safety Regulations, archived power-assisted bicycle definition — bilingual manufacturer label
Transport Canada TDG guidance and TDG Regulations for dangerous-goods marks and documents
Federal and provincial consumer packaging, language, and product-warning requirements, including Quebec where applicable

gap.en: China domestic GB labels and manuals are normally Chinese-only and do not satisfy Canadian English/French market expectations. Exporters should create a Canadian label pack covering: permanent vehicle classification label where used, manufacturer/importer identity, serial/model identifiers, maximum assisted speed, motor rating, battery voltage/Wh, charger input/output, helmet/age/province warnings, safe charging/storage, fire and water-ingress warnings, TDG battery shipment labels, and French translations reviewed for Quebec if sold there.
gap.zh: 中国国内GB标签和说明书通常仅为中文，不能满足加拿大英文/法文市场预期。出口商应建立加拿大标签包，涵盖：适用时的永久车辆分类标签、制造商/进口商身份、序列号/型号标识、最大助力速度、电机额定值、电池电压/瓦时、充电器输入/输出、头盔/年龄/省级警示、安全充电和存放、火灾及进水警示、TDG电池运输标签，以及若在魁北克销售则经审查的法语翻译。
gap.zht: 中國國內GB標籤和說明書通常僅為中文，不能滿足加拿大英文/法文市場預期。出口商應建立加拿大標籤包，涵蓋：適用時的永久車輛分類標籤、製造商/進口商身份、序列號/型號標識、最大助力速度、電機額定值、電池電壓/瓦時、充電器輸入/輸出、頭盔/年齡/省級警示、安全充電和存放、火災及進水警示、TDG電池運輸標籤，以及若在魁北克銷售則經審查的法語翻譯。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where prescribed — former federal PAB label was explicitly bilingual; current product, electrical, TDG, consumer, and Quebec language rules can make EN/FR content compulsory for specific labels, documents, and sale channels
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China domestic labels and instructions must satisfy applicable Chinese GB and consumer-product rules, generally in Chinese

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] China domestic Chinese-language labels and manuals do not meet Canadian English/French consumer-information needs as-is. A Canada-specific bilingual label, warning, manual, packaging, and TDG information package is needed, with Quebec French review where applicable.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国国内中文标签和说明书不能按现状满足加拿大英文/法文消费者信息需求。需要建立加拿大专用双语标签、警示、说明书、包装和TDG信息包，并在适用时进行魁北克法语审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國國內中文標籤和說明書不能按現狀滿足加拿大英文/法文消費者資訊需求。需要建立加拿大專用雙語標籤、警示、說明書、包裝和TDG資訊包，並在適用時進行魁北克法語審查。

source.publisher: Department of Justice Canada — Archived Motor Vehicle Safety Regulations

summary.en: China GB 17761-2018 and related GB standards require Chinese domestic product markings, warnings, and instructions. Those materials should be treated as source content for a Canada-specific English/French label and manual package, not as final Canadian consumer information.
summary.zh: 中国GB 17761-2018及相关GB标准要求中国国内产品标志、警示和说明。对于加拿大，应将这些材料视为英文/法文标签和说明书包的源内容，而非最终加拿大消费者信息。
summary.zht: 中國GB 17761-2018及相關GB標準要求中國國內產品標誌、警示和說明。對於加拿大，應將這些材料視為英文/法文標籤和說明書包的源內容，而非最終加拿大消費者資訊。

standards_or_laws: GB 17761-2018 — Safety Technical Specification for Electric Bicycles (SAMR, mandatory)
GB 42295-2023 — Electrical safety requirements for electric bicycles
GB 42296-2023 — Electrical safety — Battery charger for electric bicycles
